info.title: sml-api-bybos
info.description: REST API for SML ERP (PostgreSQL). All routes under /api/v1/ require API key + tenant headers. Includes inventory, AR/AP master, SML document writes, ERP master pickers, document-number helpers, and AR receipt writes used by BillFlow.

ApiKeyHeader.name: X-Api-Key
ApiKeyHeader.description: API key. Also accepted as 'guid' header (backward compat).

TenantHeader.name: X-Tenant
TenantHeader.description: Database (tenant) name e.g. sml1_2026. Also accepted as 'databaseName' header.

GuidHeader.name: guid
GuidHeader.description: Backward-compatible API key header used by BillFlow.

ApiKeyQuery.name: api_key
ApiKeyQuery.description: Convenience API key query parameter for curl/testing.

DatabaseNameHeader.name: databaseName
DatabaseNameHeader.description: Backward-compatible tenant header used by BillFlow/SML legacy clients.

invoice_doc_no.description: optional guard; if omitted, lookup uses order_sn/doc_ref

doc_no.description: optional; generated from doc_format_code if empty

cust_code.description: optional guard; all lines must be the same customer

databaseName.description: Optional. If provided, the response's selectedDatabase is resolved and readiness-checked immediately.

SaleInvoiceCancelRequest.description: doc_no is the new credit-note document number (required on the create call; ignored on preview).

expected_old_doc_ref.description: Optimistic-lock check; 409 if it doesn't match the current value

expected_remark_5.description: Optimistic-lock check; 409 if it doesn't match the current value

dry_run.description: When true, validates and returns the result without writing

data.description: Base64-encoded JPEG bytes, max 4MB per page

truncated.description: True when the graph hit relatedMaxNodes (30)

post.summary: Check Shopee orders against SML sale invoices and existing receipts

post.description: Creates ap_ar_trans, ap_ar_trans_detail, cb_trans, and cb_trans_detail with trans_flag=239/trans_type=2. Difference amount is written as expense detail doc_type=11 when invoice total exceeds payout.

400.description: validation failed / payout exceeds invoice / missing expense

409.description: duplicate receipt or invoice already received

get.description: Lists document formats from erp_doc_format. Optional screen_code filters by SML screen.

get.summary: Get one SML document format by erp_doc_format.code
get.description: Looks up erp_doc_format by code and returns the matching format with its screen_code. Returns 409 when one code is configured under multiple screen_code values.
Reads existing SML documents and returns the next number for saleorder, saleinvoice, purchaseorder, or receipt.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: ค้นหาจาก code/name และ field ที่ endpoint รองรับ

post.summary: Create a new product in SML

get.description: Reads the optional tenant image database `${tenant}_images`. Missing image DB returns an empty image list.

get.summary: List valid units for one SML product

200.description: product units from ic_unit_use plus unit_standard fallback

post.summary: Create purchase order (ใบสั่งซื้อ)
Create sale invoice (ใบกำกับภาษี) — uses 'details' not 'items'
Create sale order (ใบสั่งขาย)

get.summary: Get stock balance by item code
Get warehouse with shelves by code
List NextStep marketplace MQT/PREQT orders from SML
get.description: Read-only dashboard endpoint. Uses ic_qt.doc_date and MQT/PREQT document prefixes, then derives lifecycle status from related SML documents.

parameters.name: cust_code
parameters.description: Deprecated; ignored. NextStep marketplace scope is determined by MQT/PREQT document prefixes.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Optional search against MQT/PREQT doc_no, remark, sale code, or related invoice doc_no.

post.summary: SML login and list allowed databases
post.description: Validates username/password against SML_AUTH_MAIN_DATABASE (public.sml_user_list) and returns every database the user is permitted to use, each annotated with tenant image-DB readiness. Does not require or use the X-Tenant/databaseName header.

get.description: Verifies that `${tenant}` and `${tenant}_images` both exist and that public.sml_doc_images matches the configured template schema. Used by PaperLess before allowing document finalization for a tenant.

post.summary: Provision the tenant image database if missing
post.description: Guarded auto-provision: creates `${tenant}_images` and/or the sml_doc_images schema only when the main tenant DB already exists and the failure is limited to the image database/schema. Refuses when the main DB is missing or when a check fails for any other reason. Idempotent — re-verifies after a concurrent create.

Read-only: shows the credit note that would be created for this sale invoice without writing anything. doc_no in the path is the existing sale invoice; the request body's doc_no (if any) is ignored on preview.

post.summary: Create a credit note cancelling a sale invoice
post.description: Writes a credit note (ic_trans/ic_trans_detail, trans_flag=credit note) referencing the sale invoice and marks the source invoice used_status=1. Idempotent: if a credit note already exists for this sale invoice, returns 200 with status=already_exists instead of creating a duplicate.

patch.description: Updates ic_trans.doc_ref and ic_trans_detail.doc_ref for an active (last_status=0) purchase order. Supports dry_run (validate without writing) and optimistic-lock checks via expected_old_doc_ref/expected_remark_5 (409 on mismatch).

get.summary: Search documents by doc_format_code for PaperLess linking
get.description: Looks up rows in ic_trans (PO/SO/SI/...) or ap_ar_trans (PB/PV/...) depending on doc_format_code, so PaperLess can find a document to attach an uploaded file to.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Contains-literal match on doc_no, party code, customer name, or supplier name

post.summary: Look up multiple document candidates for PaperLess batch import
post.description: Normalizes up to 30 document numbers to uppercase and performs exact-match lookups in ic_trans and ap_ar_trans without per-document queries.

200.description: Canonical matching documents and missing document numbers

400.description: Invalid format code, document number, or batch limit

get.description: Always queries the smlerpmaindata.sml_user_list table regardless of the X-Tenant header — this is the SML platform's shared user registry, not a per-tenant table.

post.description: Replaces all rows for this doc_no in public.sml_doc_images in both the tenant DB and `${tenant}_images`, so PaperLess retries never create duplicate pages. Max 8 JPEG pages, 4MB each, 24MB request total.

post.summary: Lock a document after PaperLess finalization
post.description: Sets is_lock_record=1 on whichever of ic_trans/ap_ar_trans holds this doc_no (active row, last_status=0). Idempotent — locking an already-locked document returns already_locked=true without writing. Locks only the given doc_no, never a related chain.

get.description: Walks ref_doc_no/doc_ref links from the given document (e.g. PO -> receipt, SO -> SI -> CN) up to `depth` hops, for PaperLess to show the document chain.

parameters.name: doc_format_code
parameters.description: Disambiguates doc_no when the same number exists under different formats
